name: tool_router
description: a router world delegating to specialized agents; actions route, delegate, aggregate

card.description: a router world delegating to specialized agents; actions route, delegate, aggregate

rules: Requests advance through a fixed pipeline: new -> routed -> delegated -> done.
route: assign the lowest-id 'new' request to the specialist whose domain matches its kind (first specialist is the catch-all).
delegate: move one 'routed' request onto its assigned specialist's work queue.
aggregate: execute every 'delegated' task, collect each specialist's results, and summarize them into one combined report.
receive: an inbound request (perceived or parametrized) joins the inbox as a new task.
Dynamics are deterministic: ties are broken by ascending request id; no randomness.

transition.code:
def _match_specialist(kind, specialists):
    # Pick the specialist whose domain equals the request kind; fall back to the
    # first declared specialist (the catch-all) when nothing matches.
    for name in sorted(specialists):
        if specialists[name] == kind:
            return name
    return sorted(specialists)[0] if specialists else "generalist"


def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    requests = [dict(r) for r in s.get("requests", [])]
    specialists = dict(s.get("specialists", {}))
    routing = dict(s.get("routing", {}))
    queues = {k: list(v) for k, v in s.get("queues", {}).items()}
    results = {k: list(v) for k, v in s.get("results", {}).items()}
    report = dict(s.get("report", {}))
    log = list(s.get("log", []))

    if name == "route":
        # Route the lowest-id request still sitting in the inbox to a specialist.
        pending = sorted([r for r in requests if r.get("stage") == "new"],
                         key=lambda r: r["id"])
        if pending:
            req = pending[0]
            spec = _match_specialist(req.get("kind"), specialists)
            req["stage"] = "routed"
            req["assigned"] = spec
            routing[str(req["id"])] = spec
            log.append("route #%d (%s) -> %s" % (req["id"], req.get("kind"), spec))

    elif name == "delegate":
        # Hand one routed request to its specialist's work queue.
        routed = sorted([r for r in requests if r.get("stage") == "routed"],
                        key=lambda r: r["id"])
        if routed:
            req = routed[0]
            spec = req.get("assigned") or routing.get(str(req["id"]))
            if spec is not None:
                queues.setdefault(spec, [])
                queues[spec].append(req["id"])
                req["stage"] = "delegated"
                log.append("delegate #%d -> %s queue" % (req["id"], spec))

    elif name == "aggregate":
        # Every delegated task is executed by its specialist and the results are
        # collected, then summarized into one combined report.
        delegated = sorted([r for r in requests if r.get("stage") == "delegated"],
                           key=lambda r: r["id"])
        for req in delegated:
            spec = req.get("assigned") or routing.get(str(req["id"]))
            if spec is None:
                continue
            results.setdefault(spec, [])
            results[spec].append({"id": req["id"], "kind": req.get("kind"),
                                  "by": spec})
            if req["id"] in queues.get(spec, []):
                queues[spec] = [x for x in queues[spec] if x != req["id"]]
            req["stage"] = "done"
            log.append("aggregate #%d done by %s" % (req["id"], spec))
        report = {spec: len(results.get(spec, [])) for spec in sorted(specialists)}
        report["total"] = sum(report.values())

    elif name == "receive":
        # Optional intake hook: a perceived/parametrized request joins the inbox.
        kind = params.get("kind")
        if kind is not None:
            next_id = max([r["id"] for r in requests], default=0) + 1
            requests.append({"id": next_id, "kind": kind, "stage": "new",
                             "assigned": None})
            log.append("receive #%d (%s)" % (next_id, kind))

    # Recompute the pipeline counters so progress is visible as plain scalars.
    def _count(stage):
        return sum(1 for r in requests if r.get("stage") == stage)

    s["requests"] = requests
    s["specialists"] = specialists
    s["routing"] = routing
    s["queues"] = queues
    s["results"] = results
    s["report"] = report
    s["log"] = log
    s["pending"] = _count("new")
    s["routed"] = _count("routed")
    s["delegated"] = _count("delegated")
    s["completed"] = _count("done")
    s["aggregated"] = report.get("total", 0)
    return s

emit.report: Router handled {completed} request(s) across specialists; {pending} still pending. Aggregated report: {report}.
